variance-acme-2026-03.title: Monthly variance review for Acme 2026-03

dossier.core_problem: Identify and harden the top monthly performance drivers for Acme in 2026-03.
goal_state: Top 3 drivers are ranked by absolute budget variance
Narrative is grounded in KPI and driver values
Board-ready commentary is defensible before lock
current_state: 3 candidate drivers identified for top-driver review
constraints: Do not invent unsupported causal explanations
Top 3 selections must match absolute variance ranking
unknowns: Root cause detail outside the uploaded finance file
Cross-functional context not yet provided by operators
origin_direction: Prefer grounded narrative over polished but unsupported explanation
Escalate assumptions when data quality is weak
prior_round_summary: Initial top drivers: Subscription Revenue, Paid Search, Services Revenue
structural_vulnerabilities: Variance narrative can overstate causality if operational context is missing
Weak file quality can distort rank ordering
Variance narrative can overstate causality if operational context is missing
Weak file quality can distort rank ordering
The highest risk is false narrative confidence, not arithmetic failure.
The file may be sufficient for ranking but insufficient for causal explanation.
Budget comparisons may hide reclasses, phasing shifts, or one-offs.

mom-variance-acme-2026-03-vs-2026-02.title: MoM variance review: Acme 2026-02 → 2026-03

dossier.core_problem: Identify and validate month-over-month performance drivers for Acme: 2026-02 → 2026-03.
goal_state: Top MoM drivers ranked by absolute movement
Trend narrative is grounded in numeric deltas
constraints: Do not over-attribute direction until confirmed by root cause
Movement magnitude must drive ranking, not opinion
unknowns: External market factors not present in the uploaded file
Operational timing decisions that may reverse next month
origin_direction: Prefer delta-grounded statements over qualitative speculation
prior_round_summary: Top MoM drivers: Subscription Revenue, Paid Search, Hosting Costs
structural_vulnerabilities: MoM deltas can amplify timing shifts into structural-sounding trends
MoM deltas can amplify timing shifts into structural-sounding trends
The highest risk is interpreting a timing delta as a structural trend.
2026-03 and 2026-02 may not be comparable if business mix changed.
Account-level aggregation may mask meaningful departmental shifts.

forecast-variance-acme-2026-03.title: Forecast variance review: Acme 2026-03

dossier.core_problem: Evaluate forecast accuracy for Acme in 2026-03 by hardening actual-vs-forecast deviations through CHP.
goal_state: Top forecast deviations ranked by absolute error
Forecast methodology gaps identified for process improvement
Deviations classified as timing, methodology, or true surprises
constraints: Do not attribute forecast errors without methodology or timing context
Rank by absolute forecast error, not directional spin
unknowns: Forecast methodology details behind each line item
Whether deviations are systematic or account-specific
origin_direction: Prefer actionable forecast improvement over retrospective blame
prior_round_summary: Top forecast deviations: Paid Search, Events, Subscription Revenue
structural_vulnerabilities: Forecast deviations can be misattributed without methodology audit
Forecast deviations can be misattributed without methodology audit
Forecast process improvement requires understanding whether errors are random or systematic.
Forecast may be based on different methodology for different departments.
Aggregation may hide offsetting errors within an account.
